title: Mary Joyce
compiled_truth: Mary Joyce is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-02-14 to 2002-01-18), Mary Joyce sent 21 and received 207 emails, totalling 228 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (10), [Pam Butler](people/pam-butler) (7), [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (4), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (3), [Timothy Callahan](people/timothy-callahan) (2). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, calendar, deleted_items, ei_execs, inbox.
